title: The Petroleum Industry of Iran (US Bureau of Mines Information Circular 8203, 1963) -- source PDF
source_org: US Department of the Interior, Bureau of Mines (authors: L. Nahai and C. L. Kimbell)
license_terms: US Government publication (Bureau of Mines), public domain; mirror hosted at mohammadmossadegh.com (a Mossadegh-history archive site, used here only as a file host for a genuine 1963 US government document -- the document's authorship and content are entirely US Dept of Interior, not the hosting site)
notes: 130-page scanned-image PDF (no text layer -- confirmed via pdftotext returning 0 lines; Adobe Acrobat 10.1.1 Image Conversion Plug-in in metadata confirms scan-only). Extracted via this project's established methodology: pdftoppm -r 150 render to PNG + Read tool visual verification (NOT OCR/pdftotext, which is unusable on this file). 5 tables extracted into separate sibling dataset folders (see usbm1963-consortium-disbursements-1954-1962, usbm1963-aioc-profits-royalties-1910-1951, usbm1963-oil-revenue-distribution-1957-1959, usbm1963-oil-industry-employment-1939-1960, usbm1963-oil-industry-personnel-by-category-1955-1961) -- this folder holds only the raw source PDF per bookkeeping convention (raw file + manifest; extracted CSVs live in their own dataset folders alongside their own manifests, mirroring the wb1974-*/wb1971-* pattern established in Round 37 for World Bank Archives PDFs). Direct WebFetch failed with 'maxContentLength exceeded' (file too large for the WebFetch tool's 10MB cap) -- recovered via direct curl with a browser User-Agent (curl HEAD alone returned HTTP 406, but a full GET with a Safari UA succeeded and returned the complete 21.3MB file, sha256-verified).

failures.note: recovered via curl with browser User-Agent header
